data.name: AdministrationWebSite
data.value: Administration web site

data.name: CampaignsDescription
data.value: Create and manage fundraising campaigns, including dates, content, and exports.

data.name: CampaignsLink
data.value: Campaigns

data.name: CancelInvoiceDescription
data.value: Cancel an invoice by number and review canceled invoices with their reasons.

data.name: CancelInvoiceLink
data.value: Cancel invoice

data.name: ClearCacheDescription
data.value: Delete locally cached static files copied from blob storage (including the report) so fresh content is served without restarting the app.

data.name: ClearCacheLink
data.value: Clear tenant static cache

data.name: DonationsDescription
data.value: Search, view, and edit donation records, including payment status and assigned food bank.

data.name: DonationsLink
data.value: Donations

data.name: FoodBanksDescription
data.value: Manage food banks that donors can choose when making a donation.

data.name: FoodBanksLink
data.value: Food Banks

data.name: GenerateReportDescription
data.value: Build the static donation analytics report and publish it to blob storage, served at /report/.

data.name: GenerateReportLink
data.value: Generate donation report

data.name: Intro
data.value: Tools and data management for this tenant.

data.name: ProductsCataloguesDescription
data.value: Maintain the product catalogue, units, and prices shown in the donation flow.

data.name: ProductsCataloguesLink
data.value: Products Catalogues

data.name: ReloadSettingsDescription
data.value: Clear in-memory tenant configuration so updated Key Vault settings are loaded on the next request.

data.name: ReloadSettingsLink
data.value: Reload runtime settings

data.name: SearchEasypayDescription
data.value: Search payments and donations by Easypay TransactionKey.

data.name: SearchEasypayLink
data.value: Easypay search

data.name: SuperAdminDescription
data.value: Operational tools and user management (SuperAdmin access).

data.name: SuperAdminLink
data.value: Super Admin
